# Memory Router

Index of the memory skills. Invoke the right skill by name.

| Skill | Use when |
|---|---|
| `remember` | Store a lesson learned as a domain-organized memory instruction. |
| `read-memories` | Search past session logs to recall prior decisions, patterns, or unresolved work. |
